privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17's official HR module demo data. Key verified facts: (1) Result file is written to /tmp/promotion_result.json containing JSON with four evaluation criteria. (2) All referenced employees (Ronnie Hart, Jennie Fletcher, Randall Lewis, Ernest Reed, Paul Williams, Marc Demo), departments (Management, Long Term Projects, R&D), and job positions (CTO, HR Manager, Consultant, Experienced Developer) exist in Odoo 17's official demo data. (3) The setup_task.sh script creates a specific initial state: Ronnie Hart in R&D as Experienced Developer (non-CTO, non-Management); Jennie Fletcher as Consultant (non-HR Manager); three LTP employees (Randall Lewis, Ernest Reed, Paul Williams) with Consultant tag removed; and LTP department manager cleared. (4) The verifier scores 4 criteria (Ronnie promotion to CTO+Management, Jennie to HR Manager, all LTP employees get Consultant tag, LTP manager set to Randall Lewis) for 100 points total with 60-point pass threshold. (5) Odoo 17 runs on localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials connecting to the odoo_hr database.
